ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., CSE 7315c) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module associated with the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the module */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the module is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instructor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the schedule */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the course */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the course is scheduled */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week number of the semester */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the course is scheduled */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the class is held */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic covered in the course */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is required for the course */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated number of hours to cover the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance score entry */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor being evaluated */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the score */,
  "best_score" REAL /* Best score received by the instructor */,
  "second_best_score" REAL /* Second best score received by the instructor */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score received by the instructor */,
  "total_feedbacks" INTEGER /* Total number of feedbacks received */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., textbook, software) */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "is_digital" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource is digital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Instructor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
